---
title: "Day 8: Naples - Herculaneum Tour"
subtitle: "Ancient Roman City & Archaeology"
date: "2026-06-12"
day-of-week: "Thursday"
location: "Naples & Herculaneum"
categories: [itinerary, naples, herculaneum, archaeology]
---

## Overview

**Today's highlight:** Guided tour of Herculaneum archaeological site, better preserved than Pompeii

---

## Morning: Herculaneum Tour (Depart ~8-9 AM)

### Tour Details

**See:** [Tours Research - Herculaneum](../research/tours.qmd#herculaneum-archaeological-tour)

**Meeting:**
- Check tour confirmation for exact time/place
- Likely hotel pickup OR meet at Ercolano Scavi station
- Bring: comfortable shoes, water, sun protection, camera

**The Tour (~4-5 hours total):**

**Getting There:**
- Circumvesuviana train to Ercolano Scavi (20 min from Naples)
- OR private transport if tour includes

**At Herculaneum:**
- Licensed archaeologist guide
- 2-hour guided tour of ruins
- **The Boat Houses** - Most powerful moment (300 skeletons visible)
- House of Neptune and Amphitrite (vivid mosaics)
- Casa dei Cervi (elite villa with frescoes)
- Thermopolium (ancient fast food)
- Preserved wooden structures, furniture
- Much better preserved than Pompeii (sealed by volcanic mud)

**Why Better than Pompeii:**
- Upper floors intact
- Organic materials preserved (wood, fabric, food)
- Less crowded
- More manageable size
- More emotionally powerful

---

## Afternoon Options (2-6 PM)

**Option A: MANN Museum** (If Energy Remains)

**See:** [Museums - MANN](../research/museums.qmd#mann)

- Archaeological treasures from Pompeii & Herculaneum
- **Go AFTER seeing Herculaneum** (provides context)
- Farnese Collection, Alexander Mosaic, Secret Cabinet
- 2-3 hours
- €18 entry

**Timing Note:** Seeing Herculaneum in morning, then MANN makes chronological sense

**Option B: Cappella Sansevero**

**See:** [Museums - Cappella Sansevero](../research/museums.qmd#cappella-sansevero)

- Veiled Christ sculpture (mind-blowing)
- **Must book timed entry**
- Tiny chapel, 30-45 min
- €9 entry
- No photography

**Option C: Rest**
- Herculaneum is intense (emotionally and physically)
- Return to hotel, rest
- Save MANN/Cappella for tomorrow

---

## Evening: Naples (7-10 PM)

**Spaccanapoli District:**
- Historic center
- Via dei Tribunali (pizza street)
- Street life, churches, local shops

**Dinner:**
- Pizza again? (Try different pizzeria)
- Or seafood if you prefer
- Sfogliatella for dessert (if not had yet)

---

## Notes & Reflections

**Herculaneum Experience:**

**Most Powerful Moment:**

**Understanding of Ancient Rome:**

---

**Previous:** [Day 7](day-07-2026-06-10-florence-to-naples.qmd) | **Next:** [Day 9: Naples Full Day](day-09-2026-06-12-naples.qmd)
